timelines.notes: Fetched 2026-05-11. Aggregated across Al Jazeera's Sheikh Hasina / Bangladesh coverage (per user instruction, since dated entries are spread across the outlet's reporting rather than one timeline piece). Contributing articles: https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2024/8/5/timeline-sheikh-hasinas-reign-ends-after-15-years (the closest AJ has to a timeline article, but most entries pre-date cluster window) ; https://www.aljazeera.com/news/longform/2024/8/7/how-bangladeshs-gen-z-protests-brought-down-pm-sheikh-hasina (richest source — day-by-day for July-Aug 2024) ; https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2024/8/5/bangladeshs-sheikh-hasina-forced-to-resign-what-happened-and-whats-next ; https://www.aljazeera.com/news/liveblog/2024/8/5/bangladesh-protests-live-army-chief-to-address-nation-amid-new-protests ; https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2024/8/5/world-reacts-to-bangladesh-pm-sheikh-hasinas-removal-from-power ; https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2024/8/5/bangladesh-president-orders-release-of-ex-pm-khaleda-zia ; https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2024/9/9/bangladesh-taking-steps-to-extradite-former-pm-hasina-from-india ; https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2024/11/17/bangladeshs-yunus-seeks-time-says-election-roadmap-after-reforms ; https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2025/5/6/bangladeshs-khaleda-zia-returns-elections ; https://www.aljazeera.com/features/2025/5/24/why-is-bangladeshs-interim-leader-muhammad-yunus-considering-resigning ; https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2025/7/24/shoot-them-sheikh-hasina-ordered-firing-on-bangladesh-protesters-in-2024 ; https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2025/8/5/theyre-selling-the-revolution-bangladesh-a-year-after-hasinas-downfall ; https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2025/11/14/violence-in-bangladesh-as-toppled-hasinas-party-protests-crackdown-trial ; https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2025/11/19/bangladeshs-test-after-hasina-conviction-will-it-repeat-her-mistakes ; https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2025/12/19/bangladesh-on-edge-after-killing-of-2024-uprising-activist-triggers-unrest . Date approximations per rule 4: July 15 (protests turned violent) pegged to AJ Gen Z longform's date range 'July 15-20' — first day chosen as most defensible specific marker; July 23 entry from same article describes events 'partial internet restored' and protest pause without explicit day-of-week wording, used directly; Nov 17 2025 (Hasina conviction) inferred from publication of AJ Nov 19 piece referencing the verdict and CNN Nov 21 piece referencing 'the day Hasina was sentenced' — Nov 17 is the most defensible specific date. Source disagreements: death tolls during protests vary across reports (AJ Gen Z longform cites '~300' as of Aug 4; CNN cites '91 in a single day' for Aug 4; later UN figures cite up to 1,400 total). Entry on Aug 4 reports AJ's figure as stated on that date per rule. Aug 5 entry on Khaleda Zia's release dated to AJ's reporting (Aug 5); CNN frames the order as Aug 6 (Tuesday) — captured in CNN timeline separately. No private individuals named; victim families quoted in source articles deliberately omitted.

Fetched 2026-05-11. Aggregated across CNN's Bangladesh transition coverage (per user instruction). Contributing articles: https://edition.cnn.com/2024/08/05/asia/bangladesh-prime-minister-residence-stormed-intl ; https://edition.cnn.com/2024/08/06/asia/bangladesh-protests-hasina-resignation-explainer-intl-hnk ; https://edition.cnn.com/2024/08/07/asia/muhammad-yunus-bangladesh-government-intl-hnk ; https://edition.cnn.com/2024/08/12/asia/bangladesh-quota-protests-student-martyr-intl-hnk-dst ; https://edition.cnn.com/2024/10/17/asia/bangladesh-arrest-warrant-sheikh-hasina-intl-hnk ; https://edition.cnn.com/2024/12/31/asia/bangladesh-march-hasina-student-protests-intl-hnk ; https://edition.cnn.com/2025/02/05/asia/bangladesh-protest-hasina-house-intl-hnk ; https://edition.cnn.com/2025/05/13/asia/bangladesh-sheikh-hasina-awami-party-intl-hnk ; https://edition.cnn.com/2025/11/21/asia/bangladesh-india-sheikh-hasina-death-sentence-intl-hnk-dst . The Jan 6, 2024 CNN election piece (election-opposition-boycott) was excluded as it falls outside the cluster window. Date approximations per rule 4: July 15 (violence began) pegged to CNN's general phrasing 'turned violent on July 15'; Dec 16 (Yunus on elections) from the linked Reuters wire CNN cites in its Dec 31 piece — kept as the date that statement was reported; Aug 12 entry uses date from CNN's own photo caption of vandalised-mural protests; Nov 17 2025 (Hasina conviction) inferred from CNN's Nov 21 piece referencing 'the day Hasina was sentenced' shortly before publication. Source disagreements: Aug 4 single-day toll — CNN cites 'at least 91 killed' the highest single-day toll in Bangladesh's recent protest history; AJ cites ~100 same day and ~300 cumulative; both retained on respective timelines per rule. Aug 5 vs Aug 6 for Khaleda Zia's release order — CNN dates this Aug 6 (Tuesday president action); AJ dates Aug 5. Total death-toll figures evolved: early CNN coverage reported ~300, the Dec 31 CNN piece cites 'more than 1,000', and the Nov 21 2025 piece cites UN figure 'as many as 1,400' — entries report the figure stated on each date, not the final retrospective number.
